questions.question_text: Define order of convergence. Derive the order of convergence of Secant method. Perform four iterations of the secant method to obtain the smallest positive root of рЭСУ = рЭС•3 вИТ5рЭС•+ 1 = 0. 1

The equation рЭСУ = рЭС•3 вИТрЭС•2 + 16рЭС•вИТ12 = 0 has a double root at рЭС•= 2. Starting with the initial approximation рЭС•0 = 1, find the root correct to 3 decimal places using the General Newton-Raphson method with multiplicity 2. Consider the following system of linear equations рЭС•1 вИТ3рЭС•2 + рЭС•3 = 5 рЭС•1 + 2рЭС•2 + 4рЭС•3 = 7 3рЭС•1 вИТрЭС•2 + рЭС•3 = 5 Perform 5 iterations of the Gauss Seidel iterative method with initial approximation [0, 0, 0], show that the method is diverging for the given system. State the sufficient convergence condition for the Gauss Seidel iterative method. Rearrange the equations such that the system satisfies the convergence condition. 2
